dialogueChunks.intro: I hate to be the bearer of more bad news, {player_name}. But the misfortune isn't done with us yet.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The remedy you gathered? It's not working. {quest_threat} has mutated into something the alchemist has never seen, and the standard treatment only slows it. {target_npc} found a reference to a stronger compound requiring {quest_item} from deep caves {location_hint}. Without a stronger formula, our efforts to {quest_action} will fail.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every time we find a solution, the problem changes shape. But {quest_stakes} can't afford for us to stop trying.

playerResponses.text: Then I'll go deeper. Whatever it takes.
A mutating blight? This job keeps getting harder. And more expensive.
I can't chase a disease that keeps evolving. I'm sorry.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the universe has a terrible sense of humor. Listen to this.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A rockslide blocked the passage you cleared to {quest_focus}. The very next day. {target_npc} says it'll take weeks to dig through. But there's an old drainage tunnel {location_hint} that the original miners used, sealed because the {enemy_type} took it over. We need you to clear it and bring back enough {quest_item} to keep our efforts to {quest_action} going.
dialogueChunks.outro: One step forward, two steps back. That's been the rhythm of our lives lately. {quest_stakes} are running out of patience.

playerResponses.text: A sealed tunnel full of monsters? Just another day at this point. I'll go.
Your luck is genuinely astounding. Fine, show me the drainage tunnel.
Even the mountain is fighting you. I think this mine is done.

dialogueChunks.intro: It's getting worse, {player_name}. I didn't think that was possible, but here we are.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat} spread to the alchemist: the one person who knows how to prepare the cure. {target_npc} found the alchemist's notes, but they're in shorthand nobody can read. There's a recluse living {location_hint} who might help: expelled years ago over a dispute. We need you to find them and bring back enough {quest_item} for a proper batch. The territory is swarming with {enemy_type}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Our healer is sick, our notes are unreadable, and our last hope to {quest_action} is a hermit who hates us. {quest_stakes} deserve better luck than this.

playerResponses.text: I'll find the recluse and get the notes translated. We're not giving up.
A bitter hermit in monster territory? This quest has everything.
Diplomacy with angry hermits isn't really my skill set.

dialogueChunks.intro: Fate has a new twist for us, {player_name}. This one might be the cruelest yet.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The route you scouted worked for three days. Then the {enemy_type} returned in numbers we've never seen, driven out by something even they're afraid of. They've swarmed every path between us and the outside world. {target_npc} got a message to a trader who left a cache of {quest_item} hidden {location_hint}. But reaching it means fighting through the densest concentration of enemies we've ever seen to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: The supplies are tantalizingly close. But the gauntlet between us and them is the worst it's ever been. {quest_stakes} can't wait much longer.

playerResponses.text: I've fought through worse. Tell me where the cache is.
A gauntlet of monsters? At least this time there's a clear objective at the end.
Whatever scared the {enemy_type} out of their territory scares me more.
